project_name.description: Optional project name for the application stack. Leaves blank to auto-generate. Only lowercase alphanumeric characters, dashes, and underscores are allowed.

template_stackfile.description: Path to the stackfile within the template repository.

template_content.description: The raw content of the template

container_host.description: The container host name where the app will be deployed.

domain_name.description: Optional domain name for the app.

traefik_http_enabled.description: Whether to enable HTTP routing for the app.

traefik_https_enabled.description: Whether to enable SSL (HTTPS) routing for the app.

traefik_service_name.description: Name of the container service to attach the router.

traefik_container_port.description: Container port the app listens on (for Traefik routing).

traefik_network_name.description: Name of the Docker network Traefik is on. Defaults to 'traefik'.

environment.description: Environment variables to set for the application stack.
